name: Tarragon Chicken Breasts in Foil
recipeIngredient: 6 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
1/4 cup white wine vinegar,  see note
recipeInstructions:
If available use tarragon vinegar
1. Rinse chicken and pat dry.
2. Combine mustard, vinegar, oil, tarragon and pepper in a freezer bag. Add chicken and seal. Refrigerate 1 hour or over night, turning occasionally.
3. Remove chicken from bag and drain, reserving marinade. Arrange chicken in center of an 18 by 30 inch piece of foil; pile potatoes over chicken. Spoon reserved marinade over potatoes. Bring edges of foil up and crimp to seal.
4. Set bundle in center of cooking grate. Place lid on grill. Cook until potatoes are soft and chicken is no longer pink.
